summary: After the book is visibly closed, it is treated as open again with visible symbols without any intervening player or character action reopening it.
The evaluated turn turns an unplayed and previously declined Connor encounter into a concrete memory of sitting opposite Connor, creating a significant unsupported prior event.
Karina's hand is treated as continuously resting on the book immediately after the prior turn moved it away to her side, causing a minor posture continuity glitch.
The turn treats the silver bell as already given to the player even though the visible timeline still has it in Karina/Karl's custody and shows no handoff.
